name: All-Purpose Cleaning System
description: A five-ingredient system covering acid cleaning (minerals/limescale), alkaline cleaning (grease), disinfection, and specialty stain removal — replacing an entire shelf of commercial products.
replaces: Surface cleaners, glass cleaner, degreaser, oven cleaner, descaler ($3–8 each)
effectivenessNote: Matches commercial for everyday use. Vinegar/citric acid equal or beat descalers. Washing soda matches oven cleaners. -2 for no specialty surfactants (streak-free finishes).
warnings: Never mix acid and alkaline cleaners (they neutralize each other)
No acid on marble/granite/natural stone — permanent etching
H₂O₂ degrades in light — use opaque containers
scienceNote: All cleaning = acid vs base. Minerals are alkaline → acid dissolves. Grease → base saponifies. Every commercial product is an acid, base, surfactant, or combination. Five bulk ingredients replace a shelf.
